{
  "decision": "fail",
  "risk": "high",
  "work_stage": "in-service",
  "component_conditions": ["non-compliant"],
  "percent_complete": 100,
  "value": 0,
  "sound_source": "",
  "confidence": 0.95,
  "event_time": 0.0,
  "rate": 0.0,
  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Missing lockable disconnect for motor circuit maintenance — no means to LOTO the motor branch circuit",
    "NEC Art. 430 requires a disconnecting means capable of being locked in the open position for each motor circuit",
    "In-service motor without lockable disconnect creates energization hazard during maintenance"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "De-energize and apply temporary LOTO at upstream device until permanent lockable disconnect is installed",
    "Install lockable disconnecting means per NEC Art. 430 requirements at the motor location",
    "Verify disconnect is rated for motor duty and capable of being locked in the open position",
    "Update drawings and permits to reflect installed disconnect"
  ],
  "rationale": "An in-service motor circuit without a lockable disconnect violates NEC Art. 430, which requires a disconnecting means capable of being locked in the open position for each motor. This creates a serious hazard for maintenance personnel who cannot isolate the motor circuit, making the installation non-compliant and unsafe for continued operation.",
  "references": ["NEC Art. 430"]
}
